'''Altawar''' was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Corragut]] [[Species/Legends|species]], located in the [[Altawar system/Legends|Altawar system]] of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]].

==History==
Altawar was the only inhabitable [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="SOF">''[[Suns of Fortune]]''</ref> of the [[Altawar system/Legends|Altawar system]],<ref name="AOC" /> deep in the Corellian sector. It was discovered early in the history of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The native Corragut were considered the subjects of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] and were subject to Corellian rule<ref name="CCW" /> as a "client planet", with trade, defense, and related matters taken out of Corragut hands.<ref name="SOF" />

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Altawar was created for the [[Wizards of the Coast]] [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game|roleplaying game]] sourcebook, ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'', published in [[2003]].
